title: ononis hesperia
intro: Ononis hesperia, also known as the Western Jointed Pea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ononis hesperia include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to support digestive health. Ononis hesperia can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
